Hudson Interxchange - New York - 60 Hudson
data.notes:
Our 60 Hudson Street facility is designed to accommodate retail and/or wholesale colocation services, with power density exceeding that of most carrier hotels. 

Hudson IX customers can interconnect with 300+ service providers. We facilitate cross connects within our suite and via our DMARC on the 12th floor. Our DMARC is established by a dedicated conduit that runs from the 6th Floor (HUDIX) to 12th floor and gives access to both MMA’s within DRT and Databank.

data.name: DartPoints Cincinnati, OH - CVG1
data.notes:
14,715 sq ft
13,408 sq ft data center

DartPoints’ downtown Cincinnati data center is SOC audited and offers carrier-neutral network capabilities, full power redundancy and compliance-ready solutions. As a nationally trusted partner for IT expertise and Cloud strategy needs, DartPoints’ location in the heart of Cincinnati helps you meet your IT needs.

data.name: DartPoints Asheville, NC - AVL1
data.notes:
23,000 sq ft
11,200 sq ft data center

DartPoints’ Asheville data center is situated on a high plateau between the Great Smoky and Blue Ridge Mountains in the Biltmore Park Technology Center, approximately 10 miles from the NOAA National Climatic Data Center. Asheville, North Carolina is one of America’s safest weather cities.

data.name: DartPoints Greenville, SC - GSP1
data.notes:
25,800 sq ft
10,500 sq ft raised floor

DartPoints’ Greenville data center is an enterprise-class facility discreetly located in the Global Business Park, with easy access to I-85 and I-385. Greenville offers an ideal data center and disaster recovery location with its low risk of disasters, thriving IT industry, access to reliable and low cost utilities and highly-educated IT workforce. Located here since 2007, DartPoints has become a fixture in the growing Greenville business and technology community.

data.name: DartPoints Columbia, SC - CAE1
data.notes:
15,000 sq ft
5,000 sq ft raised floor

DartPoints’ Columbia data center is in the South Carolina Research Authority (SCRA) Innovation Center. The location, with easy access to the Columbia Statehouse, airport, University of South Carolina and within a two and a half hour drive from most anywhere in the state, is well situated to provide production and disaster recovery solutions to most businesses in South Carolina and elsewhere.

data.name: DartPoints Charleston, SC - CHS1
data.notes:
15,000 sq ft
5,000 sq ft raised floor

DartPoints’ North Charleston data center is located in the Palmetto Commerce Park near Ladson, in Charleston County, South Carolina. The business park is home to a handful of other high-tech facilities, including the Charleston County 911 emergency center. DartPoints’ data center is constructed to meet and exceed the conditions of the coastal region, both hurricanes and earthquakes. The location, with easy access to an airport, and just a short distance to downtown Charleston, is well situated to provide production and disaster recovery solutions to many of the businesses located in and around the Lowcountry.

data.name: DartPoints Spartanburg, SC - SPA1
data.notes:
https://dartpoints.com/locations/spartanburg/
21,400 sq ft
7,000 sq ft raised floor

As DartPoints’ second location in South Carolina’s Upstate region, the Spartanburg data center is located in a stand-alone facility near Spartanburg’s city center, with easy access to I-26 and I-85. This purpose-built data center provides a “High Tier” infrastructure, supporting a fully redundant environment, and is staffed and monitored 24/7/365. The facility is also carrier-neutral and equipped with a fiber-rich environment to provide multiple connectivity avenues.

data.name: DartPoints Columbus, IN - CLU1
data.notes:
86,400 sq ft
34,000 sq ft data center

Our Columbus data center is a purpose-built data facility located in Columbus, Indiana – central to Indianapolis, Louisville and Evansville. Every aspect of the building from the ground up was designed to create a data center that truly meets your needs. The building is hardened against mother nature (able to withstand even an EF-5 tornado) as well as being fully redundant and highly secure.

DartPoints Baton Rouge, LA - BTR1
data.notes:
86,400 sq ft 34,000 sq ft data center floor

You won’t find a facility with greater data security, better business reliability, and easier local accessibility than this battle-tested data center. Our Baton Rouge 1 Data Center has a 15+ year track record that speaks for itself—no outages, constant reliability. Our colocation services offer security and capacity to power your IT infrastructure through connectivity and beyond. You can also hand off your IT systems to our certified expert engineering team to manage everything or a portion of your environment. With maximum uptime and enterprise grade security, our Baton Rouge facility is your personal vault for important data.

East Kentucky Network Data Center
data.notes: Our 16,700-square-foot data center is a state-of-the-art facility providing a secure, accessible storage solution for business systems and data. It features redundant power sources, environmental controls, and transport capabilities to hub locations in Chicago and Ashburn, supported by our vast fiber network. We are prepared to meet the data storage needs of any business, no matter the size or location.

data.name: DartPoints Baton Rouge, LA - BTR2
data.notes:
27,000 sq ft 7,300 sq ft data center floor

Check out the custom solutions in a commercial-grade facility with N+1 architecture. This facility is outside of the 500-year flood plain on high ground, 50 feet above sea level. Both of our Baton Rouge data centers are on one of the highest-priority power grids in the state, which also includes the LA Department of Public Safety and the Governor’s Office of Homeland Security, making utility outages extremely brief if they occur at all. Move your IT systems or disaster recovery hot site to our commercial data center, where you can hand them off to our certified expert engineering team to manage all or a portion of your environment.

data.name: DartPoints Shreveport, LA - SHV1
data.notes:
87,000 sq ft 7,300 sq ft data center floor

Our Shreveport data center is located in the heart of downtown, in the former historic Selber Brothers department store building. The building’s clothing racks have been replaced with over 200 IT server and switch racks fed by 91,000 feet of power cabling – providing up to 20KW per rack for data, managed services, and cloud services. Our data center is the only Tier III rated facility in Louisiana and the 46th Uptime Institute Tier III facility in the United States.
